About Kim's Blinds Security Doors pty ltd

If you’re looking for Illawarra’s best blinds, look no further than Kim’s Blinds in Oak Flats. We offer a wide range of products and services including the supply, installation and maintenance of Blinds, Security Doors, Screens and Awnings. Our full range of products include Vertical, Holland and Venetian blinds, Drapery Tracks, Security and Screen Doors, Flyscreens, Window Grilles, as well as Aluminium and Canvas Awnings.
